name: NOVA-7 Telemetry Stream
description: Unified telemetry stream configuration for the NOVA-7 Orbital Insertion mission. Routes OpenTelemetry logs, metrics, and traces through Elasticsearch data streams with appropriate processing, enrichment, and retention policies.

sources.description: OpenTelemetry logs from all 9 NOVA-7 services via OTel Collector
OpenTelemetry metrics (gauges, counters) from all services
OpenTelemetry distributed traces from all services

pipelines.description: Enrich log records with mission context and normalized severity

processors.description: Map OTel severity numbers to standard log levels
processors.source: if (ctx.severityNumber != null) { if (ctx.severityNumber >= 17) { ctx.log_level_normalized = 'ERROR' } else if (ctx.severityNumber >= 13) { ctx.log_level_normalized = 'WARN' } else if (ctx.severityNumber >= 9) { ctx.log_level_normalized = 'INFO' } else { ctx.log_level_normalized = 'DEBUG' } }

processors.description: Resolve cloud region to geographic coordinates for map visualization
Tag error logs with the subsystem domain for dashboard filtering

pipelines.description: Classify faults by severity tier for routing and alerting

processors.description: Assign fault tier based on channel and error type
processors.source: def safety_channels = [19, 20]; def critical_channels = [2, 5, 11]; if (ctx.chaos?.channel != null) { def ch = ctx.chaos.channel; if (safety_channels.contains(ch)) { ctx.fault_tier = 'SAFETY_CRITICAL' } else if (critical_channels.contains(ch)) { ctx.fault_tier = 'CRITICAL' } else { ctx.fault_tier = 'STANDARD' } }

rules.description: Copy error logs to dedicated anomaly index for faster SE evaluation
Route safety-critical events (FTS, tracking loss) to priority index
Route cascade warning events for propagation analysis

overrides.description: Retain anomaly data longer for post-mission review
Safety-critical events retained for 1 year per compliance

views.name: NOVA-7 Mission Overview
views.description: Real-time mission status with all subsystems, active channels, and phase tracking

views.name: Anomaly Tracker
views.description: Active anomalies across all 20 channels with cascade visualization

views.name: Cross-Cloud Health Map
views.description: Service health across AWS, GCP, and Azure with latency heatmap

views.name: Range Safety Dashboard
views.description: FTS status, tracking radar health, and GO/NO-GO board
